title: Fast Place+
description: Allows you to place blocks faster. From 0 - 4 ticks per block. Press r to cycle between different speeds.
body:
Fast Place+ lets you change how fast you place blocks, 
anywhere from 0 to 4 ticks.

Press R to cycle through speeds.
Keybind can be changed in Minecraft's keybind settings.

Also you should subscribe to ziggigg because why not
